homepage.heroSubline: Metroplex Home Renovations delivers exceptional craftsmanship and lasting value. Transform your space with our experienced team.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Integrity, Driven by Quality
aboutText: Metroplex Home Renovations started with a simple goal: to provide Oklahoma City homeowners with remodeling services they can trust. We’re a locally owned and operated company, deeply rooted in the OKC community and committed to exceeding expectations on every project.

Our approach is straightforward: listen to our clients, develop smart solutions, and execute with precision. We believe in open communication, transparent pricing, and a relentless focus on quality. We treat every home as if it were our own, ensuring meticulous attention to detail and lasting results.

We're proud to be a part of the Oklahoma City community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to build strong relationships with our neighbors. When you choose Metroplex Home Renovations, you're not just hiring a contractor; you're partnering with a team that cares about your home and your community.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free consultation and discover the possibilities for your Oklahoma City home renovation.

services.name: Kitchen Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Revitalize the heart of your home with a custom kitchen remodel.
services.description:
The kitchen is the heart of any home, and a well-designed kitchen can significantly enhance your living space and increase your property value. Metroplex Home Renovations specializes in creating custom kitchens tailored to your specific needs and style. From minor updates to complete overhauls, we handle every aspect of your kitchen remodel with precision and care.

We start with a thorough consultation to understand your vision, lifestyle, and budget. Our design team will then create a detailed plan that optimizes your space, incorporates your desired features, and reflects your personal taste. Whether you're dreaming of a modern, minimalist kitchen or a cozy, traditional space, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life.

Our services include cabinet replacement or refacing, countertop installation (granite, quartz, marble, and more), backsplash design and installation, flooring upgrades, appliance installation, lighting design, and plumbing adjustments. We use only high-quality materials and work with trusted suppliers to ensure lasting beauty and functionality. We also manage all permits and inspections, so you can relax and enjoy the transformation process.

Dealing with Oklahoma's clay soil shift can impact kitchen leveling and structure. We address these issues proactively during remodeling to ensure long-term stability. With Metroplex Home Renovations, your kitchen remodel will be a seamless and stress-free experience.

faq.question: How long does a typical kitchen remodel take?
faq.answer: The duration of a kitchen remodel varies depending on the scope of the project. A minor update might take a few weeks, while a complete overhaul could take 2-3 months. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the initial consultation.

faq.question: Do I need to move out during the remodel?
faq.answer: It's often possible to remain in your home during a kitchen remodel, but it can be disruptive. We'll work with you to minimize inconvenience and create a comfortable living situation during the construction process.

faq.question: What type of countertops do you recommend?
faq.answer: The best countertop material depends on your budget, lifestyle, and aesthetic preferences. Granite, quartz, and marble are all popular choices, each with its own unique advantages and disadvantages. We can help you choose the best option for your needs.

services.name: Bathroom Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Create a luxurious and functional bathroom retreat with our remodeling services.
services.description:
Transform your outdated bathroom into a spa-like oasis with Metroplex Home Renovations. We specialize in creating beautiful and functional bathrooms that meet your unique needs and preferences. Whether you're looking for a simple refresh or a complete renovation, our team has the expertise to deliver exceptional results.

We begin with a detailed consultation to understand your vision, budget, and lifestyle. Our design team will then create a customized plan that maximizes your space, incorporates your desired features, and reflects your personal style. From modern and minimalist designs to classic and elegant styles, we can bring your dream bathroom to life.

Our services include vanity installation, toilet replacement, shower and tub installation, tile work, flooring upgrades, lighting design, and plumbing adjustments. We use only high-quality materials and work with trusted suppliers to ensure lasting beauty and durability. We also handle all permits and inspections, so you can relax and enjoy the transformation process.

Given Oklahoma City's tendency for severe weather, moisture control is paramount in bathroom remodels. We use mold-resistant materials and proper ventilation techniques to safeguard your investment against water damage.

faq.question: How much does a bathroom remodel typically cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a bathroom remodel varies greatly depending on the size of the bathroom, the materials used, and the scope of the project. We'll provide a detailed estimate after the initial consultation.

faq.question: Can you help with small bathroom remodels?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We specialize in maximizing space and functionality in small bathrooms. We can suggest creative solutions to make the most of your available area.

faq.question: What are the latest trends in bathroom design?
faq.answer: Some of the latest trends include walk-in showers, freestanding tubs, floating vanities, and smart technology integration. We stay up-to-date on the latest trends and can help you incorporate them into your design.

services.name: Whole House Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Transform your entire home with a comprehensive remodeling project.
services.description:
Embark on a transformative journey with Metroplex Home Renovations' whole-house remodeling services. We handle projects of all sizes and complexities, from cosmetic updates to complete structural renovations. Whether you're looking to modernize your home, increase its value, or simply create a more comfortable living space, our team has the expertise to deliver exceptional results.

We start with a comprehensive consultation to understand your vision, lifestyle, and budget. Our design team will then create a detailed plan that addresses your specific needs and goals. We'll work closely with you throughout the entire process, ensuring clear communication and transparency at every step.

Our services include kitchen remodeling, bathroom remodeling, flooring upgrades, painting, electrical work, plumbing adjustments, and structural modifications. We use only high-quality materials and work with trusted suppliers to ensure lasting beauty and durability. We also manage all permits and inspections, so you can relax and enjoy the transformation process.

Oklahoma City's diverse architectural styles require a nuanced approach to whole-house remodeling. We respect the unique character of each home while implementing modern upgrades.

faq.question: How long does a whole house remodel typically take?
faq.answer: The duration of a whole house remodel depends on the scope of the project and the complexity of the design. We'll provide a detailed timeline after the initial consultation.

faq.question: Do I need to move out during a whole house remodel?
faq.answer: It's highly recommended to move out during a whole house remodel, as it can be disruptive and inconvenient to live in the home during construction. We can help you find temporary housing if needed.

faq.question: How do I prepare for a whole house remodel?
faq.answer: The best way to prepare for a whole house remodel is to declutter your home, pack up your belongings, and make arrangements for temporary housing. We'll provide a detailed checklist to help you prepare.

services.name: Basement Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Transform your unfinished basement into a functional and valuable living space.
services.description:
Unlock the hidden potential of your basement with Metroplex Home Renovations. We specialize in transforming unfinished basements into functional and valuable living spaces that add value to your home and enhance your lifestyle. Whether you're looking to create a home theater, a game room, a home office, or an extra bedroom, our team has the expertise to deliver exceptional results.

We begin with a thorough assessment of your basement to identify any potential issues, such as moisture problems or structural concerns. Our design team will then create a customized plan that addresses your specific needs and goals. We'll work closely with you throughout the entire process, ensuring clear communication and transparency at every step.

Our services include framing, insulation, drywall installation, electrical work, plumbing adjustments, flooring installation, and painting. We use only high-quality materials and work with trusted suppliers to ensure lasting beauty and durability. We also manage all permits and inspections, so you can relax and enjoy the transformation process.

Oklahoma's climate and soil can present unique challenges for basement remodeling. We address potential moisture issues proactively with proper waterproofing and ventilation techniques.

faq.question: Is it worth remodeling my basement?
faq.answer: Yes, remodeling your basement can significantly increase your home's value and provide valuable living space that you can enjoy for years to come.

faq.question: How do I prevent moisture problems in my basement?
faq.answer: Proper waterproofing and ventilation are essential for preventing moisture problems in your basement. We can assess your basement and recommend the best solutions for your specific situation.

faq.question: What are some popular basement remodeling ideas?
faq.answer: Some popular basement remodeling ideas include home theaters, game rooms, home offices, extra bedrooms, and wet bars. We can help you design a basement that meets your specific needs and preferences.

services.name: Flooring Installation
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your home with expert flooring installation services.
services.description:
New flooring can dramatically transform the look and feel of your home. Metroplex Home Renovations offers expert flooring installation services for a wide variety of flooring materials, including hardwood, tile, laminate, vinyl, and carpet. Whether you're looking to update a single room or your entire home, our team has the expertise to deliver exceptional results.

We begin with a consultation to understand your style preferences, budget, and lifestyle. Our team will then help you choose the best flooring material for your needs. We'll provide a detailed estimate and schedule the installation at your convenience.

Our flooring installation services include subfloor preparation, material installation, and finishing touches. We use only high-quality materials and work with trusted suppliers to ensure lasting beauty and durability. We also guarantee our workmanship, so you can be confident in the quality of our work.

Oklahoma's fluctuating humidity can affect certain flooring types. We guide homeowners in selecting materials that withstand local conditions and employ proper installation techniques to minimize issues like warping or cracking.

faq.question: What type of flooring is best for my home?
faq.answer: The best type of flooring depends on your style preferences, budget, and lifestyle. We can help you choose the best option for your specific needs.

faq.question: How long does it take to install new flooring?
faq.answer: The duration of a flooring installation depends on the size of the area and the type of flooring being installed. We'll provide a detailed estimate during the initial consultation.

faq.question: How do I care for my new flooring?
faq.answer: The care instructions for your new flooring will vary depending on the type of material. We'll provide detailed care instructions after the installation.

services.name: Painting Services
services.shortDescription: Refresh your home with professional interior and exterior painting services.
services.description:
A fresh coat of paint can revitalize your home's interior and exterior, boosting curb appeal and creating a welcoming atmosphere. Metroplex Home Renovations offers professional painting services for residential properties in Oklahoma City and the surrounding areas. Whether you're looking to update a single room or repaint your entire home, our team has the expertise to deliver exceptional results.

We begin with a thorough preparation process, including surface cleaning, patching, and priming. We use only high-quality paints and materials to ensure a smooth, even finish that lasts for years. Our team is meticulous and detail-oriented, ensuring clean lines and flawless execution.

Our painting services include interior painting, exterior painting, trim painting, and drywall repair. We also offer color consultation services to help you choose the perfect colors for your home.

Oklahoma's extreme weather conditions demand durable paint and meticulous application. We use weather-resistant paints and proper techniques to protect your home from the elements.

faq.question: How long does it take to paint a room?
faq.answer: The duration of a painting project depends on the size of the room and the complexity of the project. We'll provide a detailed estimate during the initial consultation.

faq.question: What type of paint should I use?
faq.answer: The best type of paint depends on the surface being painted and your personal preferences. We can help you choose the best option for your needs.

faq.question: How do I prepare my home for painting?
faq.answer: We'll provide detailed instructions on how to prepare your home for painting, including removing furniture and covering surfaces.

From kitchen and bathroom renovations to whole-house remodels, we have the expertise and experience to transform your home into the space of your dreams. reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Metroplex Home Renovations did an amazing job remodeling our kitchen! They were professional, efficient, and the quality of their work is outstanding. We now have the kitchen of our dreams. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We hired Metroplex to remodel our outdated bathroom, and we're very happy with the results. They were able to transform our small bathroom into a functional and stylish space. There were a couple of minor hiccups, but they addressed them quickly and professionally.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: Metroplex installed new hardwood floors throughout our entire house, and we couldn't be happier. The installation was seamless, and the floors look absolutely beautiful. The team was courteous and professional, and they cleaned up thoroughly after the job was done.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: Metroplex transformed our unfinished basement into a fantastic home theater. They handled everything from framing and electrical work to drywall and flooring. The finished product is exactly what we wanted, and we're thrilled with the extra living space.

reviews.name: Jennifer P.
reviews.text: Metroplex painted the exterior of our house, and it looks fantastic. They did a thorough job of preparing the surfaces, and the paint job is flawless. We've already received compliments from our neighbors. The only reason I didn't give them 5 stars is because the project took a little longer than expected.

reviews.name: Thomas S.
reviews.text: From start to finish, Metroplex Home Renovations provided exceptional service. Our kitchen remodel was a complex project, involving structural changes and custom cabinetry. They handled everything with expertise and professionalism, and the end result is stunning. Highly recommend their services.
